title: CB12 White Mouthwash, Whiter Teeth After 2 Weeks, Pleasant Breath For 12 Hours, 250 ml
features: CB12 Whitening Mouthwash specifically proven formula provides pleasant breath for 12 hours by neutralizing the processes that cause unpleasant breath
CB12 White removes stains and discolouration for whiter teeth after 2 weeks, used twice a day after brushing
An alcohol-free mouthwash with a pleasant, soft peppermint flavour
CB12 White contains 0.05% sodium fluoride, an ingredient proven to strengthen your enamel with daily use
Use as required, for a 24-hour effect, rinse morning and evening
CB12 White is recommended for daily use from the age of 12
Always check the product packaging before use
description: Product Description Bad breath, also known as Halitosis, is an extremely common condition, which affects people of all ages. Bad breath can be embarrassing and, in some cases, may even cause anxiety. But did you know that you can fight not only bad breath but improve discolouration? CB12 White can help to reduce discolouration caused by coffee, tea, red wine and nicotine as well as protect your teeth from developing new stains. On top of long-lasting effects and whitening benefits, the unique formula contains fluoride, which boosts the strength of your teeth. CB12 mouthwash contains zinc and chlorhexidine, which targets and neutralizes oral volatile Sulphur compounds (VSCs). So instead of simply masking the smell, CB12 mouthwash counteracts the root causes of bad breath by eliminating VSCs. Rinse with 10 ml for 30 to 60 sec. in the morning and evening after you have brushed your teeth to enjoy a pleasant breath for 12 hours and whiter teeth. The product can be used together with CB12 Boost chewing gums or CB12 Spray. Reporting of side effects: If you get any side effects, talk to your doctor, pharmacist or nurse. This includes any possible side effects not listed in the package leaflet. Please report side effects with any medicine or vaccine to the medicines regulator MHRA through the Yellow Card Scheme. Safety information: Contains 0.05% sodium fluoride. Do not use it if you are hypersensitive to any of the ingredients of CB12. Keep out of reach of children. Not for children under 12 years of age. Ingredients: Aqua, Glycerin, Hydrogenated Starch Hydrolysate, PVP, PEG-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Aroma, Zinc Acetate, Sodium Fluoride, Potassium Acesulfame, Chlorhexidine Diacetate, Citric Acid. Alcohol-free. Directions: For 12 years and older. 10 ml per usage occasion. Use lid, fill only to top of inner cup (see illustration on back of bottle). Rinse for approx. 30-60 sec. Gargle and then spit out. Do not swallow. Use 1-2 times per day, after brushing. For verification, please email UKenquiry@viatris.com CB12-2021-0317 DOP; December 2021 Ingredients Contains 0.05% sodium fluoride, Aqua, Glycerin, Hydrogenated Starch Hydrolysate, PVP, PEG-40, Zinc Acetate Dihydrate, Chlorhexidine Diacetate, Sodium Fluoride, Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Potassium Acesulfame, Citric Acid, Aroma. Directions Fill the cap to a certain level, rinse your mouth for a certain number of seconds (often 30) and then spit it out. Safety Warning Do not use this mouthwash to swallow and avoid contact with the eyes. See more
